title: Best Agriculture College in Noida & Delhi NCR – GU
content: Funded Projects Publication WOS/Scopus Student Publication Patent Published/Granted School of Agriculture was established in the year 2018 to envisage the vision of being recognized globally for developing value based, economical, environment friendly and sustainable farming systems. The school is recognized as a well-trained centre for agricultural education and research in Delhi-NCR. Students are regularly exposed to reputed ICAR institutes, industries and real farming conditions. In addition to core faculty, a number of associated faculty members from other schools of the University take active part in teaching the students of the school. Presently, the School offers 4 year degree programme B.Sc. (Hons) Agriculture and 2 year PG degree programmes; M.Sc. (Ag.) Agronomy, M.Sc. (Ag) Entomology, M.Sc. (Ag.) Soil Science, MSc. (Horticulture) Fruit Science and Ph.D. Agriculture. Cultivating formidable partnerships with Apex and Accreditation Bodies to empower students with cutting-edge opportunities in research, innovation, and experiential learning excellence Program: B.Pharm Association to Advance Collegiate Schools of Business UP Government University Grants Commission All India Council for Technical Education The Bar Council of India Indian Nursing Council National Council for Teacher Education. Pharmacy Council of India The Indian Association of Physiotherapists Association of Indian Universities Galgotias University accredited by NAAC with the A+ Be Part of a Vibrant Community: Our student council and groups offer opportunities to connect, learn, and grow outside of the classroom. Discover how you can get involved today. Building the Next Big Thing: With 100+ Start-ups, Our incubation center is one of the India’s largest where innovation and entrepreneurship thrive. Join us in creating the future of business, technology, and social impact. Explore the Future of Tech: Our tech laboratories offer state-of-the-art equipment and expert faculty to guide you in exploring the latest advancements in tech. Start your journey today. Embrace the Opportunities of Our Dynamic Sports and Extracurricular Scene Take your Game to the Next Level with our Top-Notch Sports Infrastructure Abhishek Arora Byjus | 2018-2022It is a lifetime memory to study at Galgotias University. I learnt and grew in the University. I met people from diverse backgrounds and imbibed the best from them. I am grateful to the faculty for offering me outstanding education. If you wish to take a course in Agriculture, I propose and endorse Galgotias University. Sandeep Kumar Tiwari Krishi Jagran | 2018-2022It has been a great experience studying Agriculture in Galgotias University. My experience at the University was full of learning and grooming. Being a global university, it gave me opportunity to learn from different people of different diversities. Faculty members give hands on training and enhance the skills of the students which is needed the most in the field of agriculture. Forever grateful for all the learning. Sneha Singh Mordor intelligence | 2018-2022I had a great experience at Galgotias University. I have found the professors and staff to be incredibly friendly and helpful throughout my journey. The curriculum for my graduation has given me good opportunity for shaping my career. I am grateful for the experience and the support. I recommend the course to all the aspirants. Kashaf Naaz Acuro Organics Ltd | 1,20,000 | 2018-2022I have gained knowledge of agriculture and received hands on training to enhance my skill capabilities. The faculty members and the management were very kind and supportive in all matters. It has been great four years in Galgotias University.
